Document:
The Hemophage is a stealthy member of the parasites that relies on careful setup and planning to make the most of their ability. When they are killed, all puddles of their blood across the station will momentarily swarm with clumps of worms.
If a non-parasite makes contact with these worms, they'll be converted into a Hemophage. Note however that anyone not infected is certain to report the event, making it much harder for subsequent infections to occur.
